extortion.description: 90 GB data has been downloaded from company file servers, including:  Internal Company Data (Employees personal data, CV's, DL's, ID's, SSN's, Financial reports, Accounting data, Loans data, Agreements and much more); Clients documentation (DL's, ID's, SSN's, Financial data, Credit cardsinformation, Loans data, Agreements and much more); Complete network map including credentials for local and remote services; And more…
